title: Deva Devathai Lyrics Amara Kaaviyam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Deva Devathai
Singer(s): K.G.Ranjith, Madhu Iyer
Movie: Amara Kaaviyam
Music: M Ghibran

Deva Devathai
Thoovum Poomazhai Vizhudhey Vizhudhey
Dhoora Paayudhey
Oora Paarvaiyil Thodudhey Thodudhey (2)

Unakku Maele Urave
Illai Uyire Uyire.
Uttru Paarthaal
Unake Theriyum Naane Illai.

Saaindhu Pesave, Thevai Or Varam
Saaral Polave Aayiram Sugam.

Kaadhal Soozhum
Paarvaiyodu Kangal Koodume.
Nadakiren Mithakiren
Parakiren udan vanthidu vanthidu.
Saindhidu Serndhidu Ointhidu
En Uyir Kodu Uyir Kodu

Deva Devathai
Thoovum Poomazhai Vizhudhey Vizhudhey
Dhoora Paayudhey
Oora Paarvaiyil Thodudhey Thodudhey (2)

Unakku Maele Urave
Illai Uyire Uyire.
Uttru Paarthaal
Unake Theriyum Naane Illai.

Megam Polave dhegam Aagume
Minnal Thondriye Ennil Paayume

Kaamam Kooda
Kaadhal Aagum Unthan Anbile.
Un Thayakkamum Nerukkamaai Aanadhey
Ada Oru Nodi Oru Nodi.
Thaagamum Mogamum Neeludhey
Ada Ennai Pidi Ennai Pidi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Deva Devathai?

The song Deva Devathai conveys themes of devotion and longing, expressing deep emotional connections.

What is the plot context of the song in Amara Kaaviyam?

In Amara Kaaviyam, the song reflects the characters' emotional journey and their spiritual connection.

Who are the singers of Deva Devathai?

The song is sung by K.G. Ranjith and Madhu Iyer.

Who composed the music for Amara Kaaviyam?

The music for Amara Kaaviyam was composed by M Ghibran.

When was Deva Devathai released?

Deva Devathai was released on July 5, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Deva Devathai from Amara Kaaviyam is a soulful duet that encapsulates the essence of devotion and emotional longing. It beautifully portrays the characters' spiritual connection and their heartfelt expressions of love. The soothing melodies, combined with the enchanting vocals of K.G. Ranjith and Madhu Iyer, evoke a sense of peace and tranquility. This song serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of reflection and celebration of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Deva Devathai from Amara Kaaviyam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of devotion and love. With the enchanting voices of K.G. Ranjith and Madhu Iyer, this song is a perfect blend of soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the divine vibes as M Ghibran's music elevates the emotional depth of this captivating track.
stanzaMeanings: God, God, the fragrant flower falls, falls, from afar it comes, comes, in the view of the town, it touches, touches.
There is no bond above you, my life, my life. If you look away, you will know that I am not there.
Speak softly, a blessing is needed, like a gentle rain, a thousand joys.
Love surrounds the gaze, the eyes come together. I am moving, I am wandering, I am coming, coming. I am merging, I am joining, I am giving my life, giving my life.
God, God, the fragrant flower falls, falls, from afar it comes, comes, in the view of the town, it touches, touches.
There is no bond above you, my life, my life. If you look away, you will know that I am not there.
Like a cloud, the body will become, lightning will strike, it will rain on me.
Desire will also become love in your affection. Your embrace will be tight, oh, just one glance, just one glance. Thirst and longing will hold me, hold me.
God, God, the fragrant flower falls, falls, from afar it comes, comes, in the view of the town, it touches, touches.
There is no bond above you, my life, my life. If you look away, you will know that I am not there.
